pageHeader.title: End-to-End Designer Logistics
pageHeader.subtitle: From the receiving dock to the reveal day — one partner, complete visibility, museum-level care.

serviceDetails.title: Receiving & Inspection
serviceDetails.description: Vendors and showrooms ship directly to our High Point facility. We unload, inspect, photograph, and document the condition of every item before it enters storage.

serviceDetails.title: Climate-Controlled Storage
serviceDetails.description: Your pieces are stored in our organized warehouse — grouped by project and sequenced for install day. No more garage storage or missed deliveries.

serviceDetails.title: White-Glove Delivery & Installation
serviceDetails.description: Our uniformed, trained crews arrive fully briefed on your floor plan. We place, assemble, and stage every piece — then remove all packaging materials.

serviceDetails.title: Project Management Portal
serviceDetails.description: A shared dashboard for designers and clients to track every piece through its journey — with verified condition and location at each stage.

bottomCta.title: Serving the Triad's Top Designers
bottomCta.subtitle: Based in High Point — the Furniture Capital of the World — we understand the pace and precision your projects demand.
